name: amaranth-tweaks
description: Cross-browser extension that enlarges cramped detail popups on the Okestro groupware.

scripts.lint: bun run build && web-ext lint --source-dir build/firefox
scripts.package: bun run build && web-ext build --source-dir build/firefox --artifacts-dir dist --filename amaranth-tweaks-firefox-{version}.zip --overwrite-dest && web-ext build --source-dir build/chromium --artifacts-dir dist --filename amaranth-tweaks-chromium-{version}.zip --overwrite-dest
scripts.sign: bun run build && web-ext sign --source-dir build/firefox --artifacts-dir dist --channel unlisted
